description:
Perform a structural survivability analysis for a wind turbine rotor under extreme storm conditions using QBlade. The objective is to compare rotor thrust loads for a parked turbine in 50 m/s winds between a 'Runaway' state (0 deg pitch) and a 'Feathered' state (90 deg pitch). The analysis requires a 3-bladed rotor (20m radius, 1m constant chord, 0 deg constant twist) using a NACA 0012 airfoil with a 360-degree extrapolated polar (Re=1,000,000). Conduct simulations at 50 m/s wind speed and 0.1 RPM for both pitch configurations. Save the project file to /home/ga/Documents/projects/storm_analysis.wpa and document the resulting thrust values in Newtons at /home/ga/Documents/projects/storm_report.txt using the following format:
Thrust at 0 deg: [Value] N
Thrust at 90 deg: [Value] N
